prompt: who's using the most GPU on NRP lately? show me the top 5
summary: The top 5 namespaces collectively consumed ~568K GPU hours over the last 30 days, with braingeneers leading at 135K hours, followed closely by upenn-dyer-lab at 133K; csuf-research and cms-ml show steady research/machine learning workloads, while ucsd-haosulab rounds out the top 5 at 78K hours.
raw_output:
| Namespace | GPU Hours |
|-----------|-----------|
| braingeneers | 135,103 |
| upenn-dyer-lab | 132,646 |
| csuf-research | 128,552 |
| cms-ml | 93,646 |
| ucsd-haosulab | 78,291 |

**Summary:** The top 5 namespaces collectively consumed ~568K GPU hours over the last 30 days, with braingeneers leading at 135K hours, followed closely by upenn-dyer-lab at 133K; csuf-research and cms-ml show steady research/machine learning workloads, while ucsd-haosulab rounds out the top 5 at 78K hours.
